TH_YUYUKO-STRIKE.title: Strike
TH_YUYUKO-DEFEND.title: Defend
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA.title: Falling Cherry
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Spring[/gold].
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold] via [gold]Ethereal[/gold], apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold] and {HpLoss:diff()} [gold]Death Lust[/gold] to all enemies.
Does not count toward hand size limit.
TH_YUYUKO-NO_LIFE_DREAM.title: Spirit Sign「Dream of a Lifeless Life」
TH_YUYUKO-NO_LIFE_TICKET.title: Lifespan「Contract to a Lifeless Land」
TH_YUYUKO-NO_LIFE_TICKET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Demise[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DESIRE.title: Deadly Temptation
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DESIRE.description:
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:all|random} enemies {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold].
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:all|random} enemies {Power:diff()} [gold]Death Lust[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-LANTERN_FLOWER.title: 「Lantern of Rebirth, Flower of the Afterlife」
TH_YUYUKO-LANTERN_FLOWER.description: For each card you play, at the start of your next turn gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_YUYUKO-COLLECT_SPRING.title: Gather Spring
TH_YUYUKO-UNBORN_LIGHT.title: Unborn Light
TH_YUYUKO-UNBORN_LIGHT.description:
All enemies lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
If an enemy has [gold]Death Wish[/gold], they lose an additional {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
TH_YUYUKO-ALL_WANDERING.title: All Wandering
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DANCE_TOXIN_MOTH.title: Death Dance「Toxic Moth」
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DANCE_TOXIN_MOTH.descrip:
[gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold] {Cards:diff()} at random.
When triggering a [gold]Butterfly[/gold] effect this turn, apply an additional {Cards:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DANCE_DAZZLE.title: Death Dance「Dazzle」
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DANCE_DAZZLE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
If the number of [gold]Skill[/gold] cards drawn is at least 3, [gold]Stun[/gold] all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_HOME_SUICIDE.title: Death Home「Suicide」
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_HOME_SUICIDE.description: Change the enemy's Max HP to its current HP.
TH_YUYUKO-IMPERMANENCE.title: Principle of Impermanence
TH_YUYUKO-IMPERMANENCE.description: If the product of an enemy's [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks and [gold]Death Lust[/gold] stacks is not less than its {IfUpgraded:show:current|max} HP, instantly kill that enemy.
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_BUTTERFLY_SLEEP.title: Death Butterfly「Eternal Sleep of Kasuga」
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_BUTTERFLY_SLEEP.descripti:
Apply {HpLoss:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies.
Reduce this card's cost by {Energy:energyIcons()} for each [gold]Death Butterfly[/gold] you have.
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_RETURN_EARTH.title: Dead Return Earth
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_RETURN_EARTH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Deal an additional {Cards:diff()} damage for each [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stack on the enemy.
TH_YUYUKO-OPPOSITE_SHORE_TEMPTATION.desc:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to an enemy.
For every {Power:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold] on the enemy, apply an additional {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DANCE_MAGIC_MIRROR.title: Death Dance「Magic Mirror」
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DANCE_MAGIC_MIRROR.descr:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
When attacked this turn, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-REVERSED_BUTTERFLY_ONE_BLOOM.d:
[gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold]: [green]Soul Butterfly[/green] 1.
Choose a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and return it to your hand{IfUpgraded:show:, and it costs 0 the first time played this turn|}.
TH_YUYUKO-REVERSED_BUTTERFLY_ONE_BLOOM.s: Choose a card to return to hand.
TH_YUYUKO-REVERSED_BUTTERFLY_THREE_BLOOM:
[gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold]: [green]Soul Butterfly[/green] 3.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Spring[/gold].
Whenever you play a [gold]Soul[/gold], return this card to your hand.
[gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold]: [green]Soul Butterfly[/green] 5.
Apply [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies equal to the number of your [gold]Butterflies[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_DREAM_DANCE.title: Butterfly Dream Dance
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_DREAM_DANCE.descript:
[gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold] X at random.
{IfUpgraded:show:Against all|Against random} enemies, trigger all [gold]Butterfly[/gold] effects X times.
TH_YUYUKO-SPHERE_BLOOM.title: Flower Whip
TH_YUYUKO-SPHERE_BLOOM.description:
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_HOME_ROADLESS.title: Death Home「Roadless Path」
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_HOME_ROADLESS.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_HOME_ORIGINAL_SIN.title: Death Home「Original Sin」
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_HOME_ORIGINAL_SIN.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase this card's damage by {Cards:diff()} for each type of debuff on the enemy.
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_HOME_WANDERING_SOUL.desc:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy.
For the next {Cards:diff()} turns, [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] on that enemy are twice as effective.
If the enemy has [gold]Death Lust[/gold], multiply this card's effects by {Cards:diff()}.
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_SIGIL_GHASTLY_DREAM.desc:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], and [gold]Death Lust[/gold] to all enemies.
Draw 2 cards.
TH_YUYUKO-REVERSING_SCREEN.title: Reversing Screen
TH_YUYUKO-REVERSING_SCREEN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
When attacked this turn, deal equal damage to all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-GOOD_DEATH_SPIRIT.title: Good Death Spirit
TH_YUYUKO-GOOD_DEATH_SPIRIT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal additional damage once for each [gold]Death Lust[/gold] stack on the enemy.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Lust[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-FLOWER_SPIRIT_SWALLOWTAIL_BUTT:
Draw 1 card.
Draw 1 card next turn.
Draw an additional card for each type of [gold]Butterfly[/gold] you have.
TH_YUYUKO-FLOWER_SPIRIT_DEEP_ROOTED_BUTT: For each card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], [gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold]: [blue]Spirit Butterfly[/blue] 1, then shuffle your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-FLOWER_SPIRIT_BUTTERFLY_DELUSI: Choose up to the number of your [gold]Butterflies[/gold] cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and put them into your hand, then consume that many [gold]Butterflies[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:, and they cost 0 the first time played this turn|}.
Choose cards to put into your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_BUTTERFLY.title: Ghost Butterfly
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_BUTTERFLY.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). Drawn cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and cost 0 the first time played this turn.
TH_YUYUKO-SEAMLESS_GHOST.title: Seamless Ghost
TH_YUYUKO-SEAMLESS_GHOST.description: Whenever you draw, play, or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-NETHERWORLD_GHOST_GIRL.title: Netherworld Ghost Girl
TH_YUYUKO-NETHERWORLD_GHOST_GIRL.descrip:
Give all your cards [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} extra.
TH_YUYUKO-SNOW_DEATH_SPIRIT.title: Snow Death Spirit
TH_YUYUKO-SNOW_DEATH_SPIRIT.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold] via [gold]Ethereal[/gold], play that card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_DANCE_OUKA_RANMAN.title: Ghost Dance「Splendid Cherry Blossoms」
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_DANCE_OUKA_RANMAN.descri: Each time you draw a card during your turn, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Spring[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-FLOWER_DANCING_GHOST.title: Flower-Dancing Ghost
TH_YUYUKO-FLOWER_DANCING_GHOST.descripti: Whenever you play an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_YUYUKO-END_THOUSAND_SAKURA_FEAST.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
For each [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] you have (wherever it is), double this card's damage once.
End your turn.
TH_YUYUKO-SAIGYOU_NIHON_ZAKURA.title: 「Saigyou Garden Thousand Cherry Blossoms Scroll」
TH_YUYUKO-SAIGYOU_NIHON_ZAKURA.descripti: [gold]Transform[/gold] any number of cards in your hand into [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-TEMPTING_NECTAR.title: Soul-Tempting Nectar
TH_YUYUKO-OTHERWORLD_KASUKA.title: Otherworldly Kasuga
TH_YUYUKO-OTHERWORLD_KASUKA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever a non-eponymous card enters your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] or [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], {IfUpgraded:show:automatically play this card|return this card to your hand}.
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_MELODY_FAKE_SPIRIT.title: Ghost Melody「Fake Spirit」
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_MELODY_FAKE_SPIRIT.descr: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and put {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copies of it into your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-UNDERWORLD_SIGIL_YOMOTSU_HIRAS: Draw until you draw a non-[gold]Ethereal[/gold] card. For each card drawn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_MELODY_ILLUSION_SPIRIT.d: Choose any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and put them on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]; give them [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and they cost 0 until played.
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_MELODY_ILLUSION_SPIRIT.s: Choose cards to put on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_MELODY_GOD_SPIRIT.title: Ghost Melody「God Spirit」
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_MELODY_GOD_SPIRIT.descri: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all your [gold]Ethereal[/gold] cards for this combat and reduce their cost by 1 for this combat.
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_BUTTERFLY_SPIRIT.title: 「Death Butterfly Spirit」
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_BUTTERFLY_SPIRIT.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a [purple]Death Butterfly[/purple], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
If you have a [blue]Spirit Butterfly[/blue], draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_YUYUKO-DEATHBED_MANIPULATION.title: Deathbed Manipulation
TH_YUYUKO-DEATHBED_MANIPULATION.descript: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the total [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks of all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_STORM.title: Yokai Wind Sign「Native Butterfly Storm」
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_STORM.description:
Deal X{IfUpgraded:show:+ number of [gold]Butterfly[/gold] types you own|} damage to all enemies.
Deal additional damage once for each [gold]Butterfly[/gold] stack.
TH_YUYUKO-BURIED_BONES.title: Bones Buried in Hirokawa
TH_YUYUKO-BURIED_BONES.description:
Deal damage equal to the total [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks to all enemies.
Deal additional damage once for each living enemy.
TH_YUYUKO-SOUL_TEMPTATION_SPIRIT_EMERGEN: [gold]Consume[/gold] all of an enemy's [gold]Death Wish[/gold]. For every {Cards:diff()} stacks consumed, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_SEAL.title: Sakura Sign「Seal」
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_SEAL.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
The enemy loses {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
If the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card is [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold], the loss is permanent.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_DEATH_SELF.title: Sakura Sign「Death of Self」
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_DEATH_SELF.descri:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
If you have [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] in hand, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold]; otherwise, lose {HpLoss:diff()} Max HP.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_SPRING_SLEEP.desc:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Spring[/gold].
Heal HP equal to your [gold]Spring[/gold] stacks.
End your turn.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_BLOOM.title: Sakura Sign「Bloom」
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_BLOOM.description:
Shuffle 4 [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
For each [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] you have (wherever it is), gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Spring[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_SIGIL_NETHERWORLD_MYSTER: Whenever an enemy's [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks change, gain [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to the amount of change.
TH_YUYUKO-UNDERWORLD_SIGIL_ETERNAL_NIGHT: At the start of your turn, put {Cards:diff()} [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_SIGIL_SWALLOWTAIL_DE:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply [gold]Death Wish[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
For each type of [gold]Butterfly[/gold] you have, double this card's damage once.
TH_YUYUKO-SWALLOWTAIL_SPEAR.title: Swallowtail Spear
TH_YUYUKO-SWALLOWTAIL_SPEAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal an additional 1 damage for each [gold]Butterfly[/gold] stack.
Deal additional damage once for each type of [gold]Butterfly[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For every 4 damage dealt, randomly [gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold] 1.
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_HOME_NO_RETURN_PATTERN.d: [gold]Death Wish[/gold] reduces an additional {Cards:diff()} Max HP.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_SAIGYOU_SAKURA_FU:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Put {Cards:diff()} [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] respectively.
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_SIGIL_DRUNKEN_LIFE_DEATH: Cards with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] can be played for free.
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_SIGIL_FLOWER_BUTTERF: At the start of your turn, for each type of [gold]Butterfly[/gold] you have, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-REMYSTERY_GENSOKYO_YOMIGAERI.d: Choose two cards from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] (excluding same-name cards) and return them to your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-REMYSTERY_GENSOKYO_YOMIGAERI.s: Choose cards to return to your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-UNWAVERING_GHOST.title: Unwavering Ghost
TH_YUYUKO-UNWAVERING_GHOST.description: Whenever you draw a [purple]Curse[/purple] or [red]Status[/red] card, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_YUYUKO-KASUKA_DEATH_SPIRIT.title: Kasuga Death Spirit
TH_YUYUKO-FUJIMI_NO_ONNA.title: Fujimi no Onna
TH_YUYUKO-FUJIMI_NO_ONNA.description:
At the start of your turn, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Lust[/gold] to all enemies.
Whenever an enemy's HP changes, apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to it.
TH_YUYUKO-HYAKKA_RYORAN_SONG.title: Hundred Flowers Song
TH_YUYUKO-HYAKKA_RYORAN_SONG.description: At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card(s), then shuffle 1 [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-BANQUET_POSTHUMOUS_REUNION.des: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy with [gold]Death Wish[/gold], other enemies lose an equal amount of HP.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_FLOWER_UNATTACHED_SAKUR:
At the end of your turn, choose any number of cards to [gold]Retain[/gold].
For each card [gold]Retained[/gold], put a [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-STARVING_SPIRIT_FORM.title: Starving Spirit Form
TH_YUYUKO-STARVING_SPIRIT_FORM.descripti: Whenever you deal damage, make the enemy lose an equal amount of Max HP, then you gain 20% of your Max HP.
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_BUTTERFLY_GHOST_SPOT.des:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] {Cards:diff()} times.
Randomly [gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold] {Cards:diff()}.
This card's [gold]Block[/gold] is increased by the number of [gold]Butterflies[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-ELEGANCE_YOMOTSU_EGREGOIRE.des:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold].
If the enemy has [gold]Death Lust[/gold], apply another {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold]; otherwise, apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Death Lust[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-DECEASED_RELIC.title: Relic of the Deceased
TH_YUYUKO-DECEASED_RELIC.description:
For each enemy that dies, gain 1 random [gold]Relic[/gold] after combat.
Upon pickup, add a [gold]Recall[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-RECALL.title: Recall
TH_YUYUKO-RECALL.description: When drawn, give all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] [gold]Ethereal[/gold], then end your turn immediately.
TH_YUYUKO-HAKUGYOKUROU_GHOST.title: Hakugyokurou's Hungry Ghost Legend
TH_YUYUKO-HAKUGYOKUROU_GHOST.description:
Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], you gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
At the end of your turn, if no card was [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this turn, gain 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Frail[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-TALISMAN_THREE_DISTANT_PAST.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase this card's damage by {Cards:diff()} for each card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Deal additional damage once for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-TALISMAN_TICKET_DEAD_BUTTERFLY:
[gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold]: [purple]Death Butterfly[/purple] 4.
Each time you play a card this turn, [gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold]: [purple]Death Butterfly[/purple] 4.
TH_YUYUKO-ELEGANT_SPIRIT_PHOTO.title: Elegant Spirit Photo
TH_YUYUKO-ELEGANT_SPIRIT_PHOTO.descripti: Put an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copy of the first card you play each turn into your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-PURPLE_HIGAN_SAKURA_DELAYED_BL:
Put {Cards:diff()} [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into all players' hands.
Then put a copy of this card into all players' [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-SAIGYOUJI_MUYO_NEHAN.title: 「Saigyouji's Muyo Nirvana」
TH_YUYUKO-SAIGYOUJI_MUYO_NEHAN.descripti: Multiply all enemies' [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks by {Power:diff()}.
TH_YUYUKO-GODS_LOVED_GENSOKYO.title: Gods' Beloved Gensokyo
TH_YUYUKO-GODS_LOVED_GENSOKYO.descriptio: All players choose a card from their own deck and add it to their hand.
TH_YUYUKO-GODS_LOVED_GENSOKYO.selectionS: Choose a card to add to your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-ENDLESS_APPETITE.title: Endless Appetite
TH_YUYUKO-ENDLESS_APPETITE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
If the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card is a [purple]Curse[/purple] or [red]Status[/red] card, double this card's effect.
TH_YUYUKO-FALLING_FLOWER_RESONANCE.title: Falling Flower Resonance
TH_YUYUKO-FALLING_FLOWER_RESONANCE.descr: Whenever a [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {Cards:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_LEAD.title: Ghost Lead
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_LEAD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and put it on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_LEAD.selectionScreenProm: Choose a card to put on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-FUUKA_ENBU_JIN.title: Wind Flower Circular Dance Formation
TH_YUYUKO-FUUKA_ENBU_JIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Repeat this card's effect once for each living enemy.
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_MELODY_GHOST.title: Ghost Melody「Ghost」
TH_YUYUKO-GHOST_MELODY_GHOST.description: Discard up to {Cards:diff()} card(s), gain that much {Energy:energyIcons()}, and at the start of your next turn, gain that much {Energy:energyIcons()} again.
TH_YUYUKO-SENSE_OF_ELEGANCE.title: Graceful Ease
TH_YUYUKO-SENSE_OF_ELEGANCE.description: If the enemy intends to attack, gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn; otherwise, gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_YUYUKO-FOOD_INSTANT_DISAPPEARANCE.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card deals {Cards:diff()} times damage to enemies with less Max HP than you.
TH_YUYUKO-YUMEIRORAKU_GHOST.title: Ghost of Yumeiroraku
TH_YUYUKO-YUMEIRORAKU_GHOST.description: Cards with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] are played an additional {Cards:diff()} times.
TH_YUYUKO-WIND_YOKAI_SIGIL_DEAD_BUTTERFL:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold]: [purple]Death Butterfly[/purple] 4.
When played, all cards with the same name gain [gold]Replay[/gold] 1.
TH_YUYUKO-BORDER_OF_LIFE.title: Border of Life and Death
TH_YUYUKO-BORDER_OF_LIFE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Give all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] them.
TH_YUYUKO-SPIRIT_BUTTERFLY_BUTTERFLY_WIN: Spirit Butterfly「Butterfly Wind Lingers in This World」

[gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold]: [blue]Spirit Butterfly[/blue] {Cards:diff()}.
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] and {Energy:energyIcons()} this turn.
TH_YUYUKO-GAZING_EYES_PITY_FLOWER.title: Gazing Eyes Pity Flowers, Flowers as Friends
TH_YUYUKO-GAZING_EYES_PITY_FLOWER.descri: Whenever you are attacked, if you have a [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] not in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], [gold]Exhaust[/gold] one and ignore this damage.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_SENSE_OF_CHERRY_B: Sakura Sign「Will of the Cherry Blossom」

Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For each [gold]Spring[/gold] you have, reduce damage taken this turn by 1.
TH_YUYUKO-YOKAI_FLOWER_SIGIL_BUTTERFLY_S: Yokai Flower Sign「Butterfly Storm Enma Shaku」

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies 6 times.
The number of damage instances is increased by your [gold]Butterfly[/gold] stacks.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_SAKURA_HELL.title: Sakura Sign「Sakura Hell」
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_SIGIL_SAKURA_HELL.descr: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your hand. For each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies, then put a [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your hand. If any of the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] cards were [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold], double this card's damage.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_FLOWER_SAKURA_FUBUKI_KO:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} times.
Put {Cards:diff()} [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-DEAD_BUTTERFLY_FLOATING_MOON.d: Whenever you [gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold], all enemies lose Max HP equal to the number of your [purple]Death Butterflies[/purple].
TH_YUYUKO-TALISMAN_TWO_HAKUGYOKUROU_SHID:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Spring[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
TH_YUYUKO-FEAST_SAIGYOU_AYAKASHI_PRUNING:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies, then heal HP equal to damage dealt. Excess healing is converted to Max HP at a {Cards:diff()}:1 ratio.
This card's damage is increased by your [gold]Spring[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-GORGEOUS_DESPAIR_DANCER.title: Gorgeous Despair Dancer
TH_YUYUKO-GORGEOUS_DESPAIR_DANCER.descri: Each time you draw or play a card, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-SLOW_GHOST.title: Slow Ghost
TH_YUYUKO-SLOW_GHOST.description:
All characters gain 1 [gold]Slow[/gold].
[gold]Slow[/gold] no longer decreases naturally. When you play a non-Attack card, reduce your own [gold]Slow[/gold] by 1.
TH_YUYUKO-HAKUGYOKUROU_DAIRY.title: Hakugyokurou Dairy
TH_YUYUKO-HAKUGYOKUROU_DAIRY.description: At the start of your turn, put a [gold]Yuyuko Milk[/gold] and [gold]Youmu Juice[/gold] into your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-YUYUKO_MILK.title: Yuyuko Milk
TH_YUYUKO-YUYUKO_MILK.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} Max HP.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Effect is doubled if this card has [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-YOUMU_JUICE.title: Youmu Juice
TH_YUYUKO-YOUMU_JUICE.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} Max HP.
Draw {Power:diff()} card(s).
Effect is doubled if this card has [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-INDULGENCE.title: Indulgence
TH_YUYUKO-INGREDIENT_EXTRACTION.title: Ingredient Extraction
TH_YUYUKO-INGREDIENT_EXTRACTION.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn equal to the unblocked damage dealt, then make the enemy lose that much [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_YUYUKO-SUMIZOME_SAKURA.title: Ink-Dyed Sakura
TH_YUYUKO-SUMIZOME_SAKURA.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your hand.
Your [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] cost 1 more energy. Whenever you draw or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold], put a copy of it into your hand.
TH_YUYUKO-ENRI_ESHI_KINGU_JODO.title: 「Rejecting the Impure Land, Seeking the Pure Land」
TH_YUYUKO-ENRI_ESHI_KINGU_JODO.descripti: Multiply damage you deal to enemies with [gold]Death Wish[/gold] or [gold]Death Lust[/gold] by {Cards:diff()}.
